name: shiye-management-system
description: Shiye management system for 3x-ui user nodes, renewals, SOCKS routing and sync logs.

scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @shiye/shared && npm run build -w @shiye/xui-client && npm run build -w @shiye/payment-core
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @shiye/api && npm run build -w @shiye/admin-web && npm run build -w @shiye/user-web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck:workspaces
scripts.db:deploy: npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:migrate && npm run db:seed
